channel.title: GOOGL — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on GOOGL (Alphabet) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: ADDED GOOGL (+277%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) added GOOGL in Q4 2025 · 2.7% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Stanley Druckenmiller)

item.title: Tom Slater: ADDED GOOGL (+167%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Tom Slater (Baillie Gifford (Long Term Global Growth)) added GOOGL in Q4 2025 · 0.5% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Tom Slater)

item.title: Andreas Halvorsen: NEW POSITION GOOGL (+100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Andreas Halvorsen (Viking Global Investors) new position GOOGL in Q4 2025 · 2.2% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Andreas Halvorsen)
